title: Birthday Quote
excerpt: Can't believe I'm 37! Could not agree more with wise ol' Abe. I plan on sharing more thoughts on my birthday tomorrow with my 36 while 36 list. If you have a favorite quote about birthdays or getting older and…
body:
Can't believe I'm 37! Could not agree more with wise ol' Abe. I plan on sharing more thoughts on my birthday tomorrow with my 36 while 36 list. If you have a favorite quote about birthdays or getting older and wiser, please share in the comments!

Still trying to spread more love and motivation for each of your Mondays this year. I'm still using this watercolor set from Michaels and I got a new brush from a local art supply store, and found the same Princeton Select brush online at Joann.
